_description: OpenAI GPT-4.1 (gpt-4.1-2025-04-14). Purpose-built for coding and instruction following. 1M token context window, superior at long-document understanding, and optimized for agentic tool use. Best OpenAI model for software engineering tasks.

tool_calling._comment: GPT-4.1 excels at agentic tool use with very high reliability. Parallel function calling supported.

structured_output._comment: Supports structured outputs with guaranteed schema adherence.

dynamic_temperature._comment: Lower temperature on retries for more deterministic output.

tool_call_batching.system_prompt_suffix: When multiple tools are needed, call ALL of them in a single response using parallel function calling.
tool_call_batching._comment: GPT-4.1 natively supports parallel function calls with high reliability.

pricing._comment: As of 2025. Cheaper than GPT-4o with better coding performance.

running_config.description: OpenAI hosted API. Requires OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable.
